summary_sections.title: Overview
summary_sections.content_html: Fluid Dynamics and Bernoulli's Equation is a key topic in Fluid Mechanics for AP Physics 2.

summary_sections.title: Key Concepts
summary_sections.content_html: This lesson covers the fundamental principles of fluid dynamics and bernoulli's equation.

summary_sections.title: Applications
summary_sections.content_html: Understanding fluid dynamics and bernoulli's equation has applications in various areas of physics and engineering.
